
# Wednesday


| Time   | Content             | Teaching form    | Teacher            |                 
| ------ | ------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------ |
| 9-11h  | **Feedback on your Logic model of change** | Plenary session |  Dr GJ Peters |
| 11-13h | **Revise logic model and prepare step 3** | Little groups |
| 13-15h | **Step 3: Program design methods and applications (chapter 6)** | Plenary session | Dr GJ Peters |
| 15-18h | **Tasks program design** | Little groups |  



![Program Design](img/programdesign.png)

## Task - Process feedback: Revise logic model and matrices 

●	Find a place on campus with your little group
●	Use the feedback you received during the plenary session to enhance both your logic model of change and matrices 
●	Read IM book (pp 345-364) to prepare for the plenary session


## Task – Identify methods and applications 

●	Identify methods and applications to influence the determinants in the desired direction. 
o	Look at your change objectives organized by determinants (see yesterday’s and today’s matrices and use chapter 6 of the IM book).
 
o	Try to link objectives to theoretical methods. If you are unable to identify methods but able to identify applications, ask yourself – why would it work? The answer will lead you to a method.
